content: Patient: Arjun Roy, 42, Male. Diagnosis: Severe Cervical Strain (C5-C6) with Radiculopathy. Treatment: Daily physiotherapy, 30 mins, for 14 days. Prognosis: Requires bed rest and avoidance of physical stress. Advised to discontinue driving. Date of last session: August 13, 2023. Signed: Dr. Suman Mukherjee. [Signature and clinic stamp] NOTE: This document was later determined to be forged. The clinic was closed on August 14. No session occurred on August 10 or 13. The signature and stamp were digitally replicated.
